briefdescription.para: Access storage for the most recent data read from the sensor.

detaileddescription.para: This content of the object referenced is updated by sensor_fetch_sample(), except for ccs811_result_type::mode which is set on driver initialization.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the result information.

briefdescription.para: Fetch operating mode and version information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to where the returned information should be stored

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative errno code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Fetch the current value of the BASELINE register.

detaileddescription.para: The BASELINE register encodes data used to correct sensor readings based on individual device configuration and variation over time.
For proper management of the BASELINE register see AN000370 "Baseline Save and Restore on CCS811".

simplesect.para: a non-negative 16-bit register value, or a negative errno code on failure.

detaileddescription.para: For proper management of the BASELINE register see AN000370 "Baseline Save and Restore on CCS811".

parameterdescription.para: the value to be stored in the BASELINE register.

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, negative errno code if failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const struct sensor_value *temperature, const struct sensor_value *humidity)
memberdef.name: ccs811_envdata_update

detaileddescription.para: Accurate calculation of gas levels requires accurate environment data. Measurements are only accurate to 0.5 Cel and 0.5 RH.

parameterdescription.para: the current temperature at the sensor
the current humidity at the sensor

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, negative errno code if failure.

briefdescription.para: Extended public API for CCS811 Indoor Air Quality Sensor.

detaileddescription.para: Some capabilities and operational requirements for this sensor cannot be expressed within the sensor driver abstraction.
